## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` pass locally
- [ ] A changeset was added (`pnpm changeset`), or this PR doesn't need one
- [ ] Docs updated if public API or behavior changed
- [ ] No new maintainer-hosted infra introduced (Zero-Infra Guarantee)
